spec.rawSQL:
WITH distance_deltas AS (
    SELECT
        distancetrip - LAG(distancetrip) OVER (ORDER BY t) AS delta_distance
    FROM
        tbl_${device:csv}_can9_gnssdistance
    WHERE
        date_created BETWEEN $__rawTimeFrom('yyyy/MM/dd') AND $__rawTimeTo('yyyy/MM/dd')
        AND
        $__timeFilter(t)
)
SELECT
    SUM(IF(delta_distance > 0, delta_distance, 0)) AS sum_positive_delta_distance
FROM
    distance_deltas
WHERE
    delta_distance IS NOT NULL;

SELECT
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval) as time,
    AVG(S01PID53_AbsEvapSysVapPres) as AVG_S01PID53_AbsEvapSysVapPres
FROM
    tbl_${device:csv}_CAN1_OBD2_S_M41_S01PID_M53
WHERE
	date_created BETWEEN $__rawTimeFrom('yyyy/MM/dd') AND $__rawTimeTo('yyyy/MM/dd') 
	AND
    $__timeFilter(t)
GROUP BY
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval)	
ORDER BY 
    time asc

SELECT
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval) as time,
    AVG(satellites) as AVG_satellites, AVG(fixtype) as AVG_fixtype
FROM
    tbl_${device:csv}_can9_gnssstatus
WHERE
	date_created BETWEEN $__rawTimeFrom('yyyy/MM/dd') AND $__rawTimeTo('yyyy/MM/dd') 
	AND
    $__timeFilter(t)
GROUP BY
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval)

spec.title: Fix
spec.description: This reflects the average GNSS Fix Type: 0 "No fix", 1 "Dead reckoning only", 2 "2D-fix", 3 "3D-fix", 4 "GNSS + dead reckoning combined", 5 "Time only fix"

spec.rawSQL:
SELECT

    AVG(altitude) as AVG_altitude

WHERE

	AND

SELECT
    t as time,
    S09PID02_VIN_WMI as WMI,
    S09PID02_VIN_Model as Model,
    S09PID02_VIN_SecurityDigit as SecurityDigit,
    S09PID02_VIN_Year as Year,

WHERE

	AND
    $__timeFilter(t)
ORDER BY 
    t asc

SELECT

	AND
    $__timeFilter(t)
GROUP BY
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval)	
ORDER BY

SELECT
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval) as time,
    avg(S01PID04_CalcEngineLoad) as EngineLoad
FROM
    tbl_${device:csv}_CAN1_OBD2_S_M41_S01PID_M04

    $__timeFilter(t)
GROUP BY
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval)

SELECT
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval) as time,
    avg(S01PID0C_EngineRPM) as EngineSpeed
FROM
    tbl_${device:csv}_CAN1_OBD2_S_M41_S01PID_M0C
WHERE
    date_created BETWEEN $__rawTimeFrom('yyyy/MM/dd') AND $__rawTimeTo('yyyy/MM/dd')
    AND
    $__timeFilter(t)
GROUP BY
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval)

SELECT
    -- min(t) as first,
    -- max(t) as last,
    -- max(S03_DTC) as "DTC (Dec)",
    max(S03_DTC) as "DTC",
    max(S03_DTC) as "DTC (Name)"
FROM
    tbl_${device:csv}_CAN1_CALC_OBD2_DTC
WHERE
	date_created BETWEEN $__rawTimeFrom('yyyy/MM/dd') AND $__rawTimeTo('yyyy/MM/dd') 
	AND
    $__timeFilter(t)
GROUP BY
    S03_DTC
order by S03_DTC asc

717.text: Cylinder 1 Fuel Injector Offset Learning At Max Limit

spec.rawSQL:
SELECT
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval) as time,
    MAX(S01PID0C_EngineRPM) as EngineRPM
FROM
    tbl_${device:csv}_CAN1_OBD2_S_M41_S01PID_M0C
WHERE
	date_created BETWEEN $__rawTimeFrom('yyyy/MM/dd') AND $__rawTimeTo('yyyy/MM/dd') 
	AND
    $__timeFilter(t)
GROUP BY
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval)

SELECT
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval) as time,
    MAX(S01PID0D_VehicleSpeed) as VehicleSpeed
FROM
    tbl_${device:csv}_CAN1_OBD2_S_M41_S01PID_M0D
WHERE
	date_created BETWEEN $__rawTimeFrom('yyyy/MM/dd') AND $__rawTimeTo('yyyy/MM/dd') 
	AND
    $__timeFilter(t)
GROUP BY
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval)

SELECT
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval) as time,
    ${signal_value:csv}
FROM
    tbl_${device:csv}_${message:csv}
WHERE
	date_created BETWEEN $__rawTimeFrom('yyyy/MM/dd') AND $__rawTimeTo('yyyy/MM/dd') 
	AND
    $__timeFilter(t)
GROUP BY
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval)	
order by 
    time asc

spec.title: GPS Position
spec.description: This shows the GPS position with color coding based on Speed (in km/h).

spec.rawSQL:
SELECT
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval) as Time,
    AVG(longitude) as AVG_longitude, AVG(latitude) as AVG_latitude, AVG(positionaccuracy) as AVG_positionaccuracy
FROM
    tbl_${device:csv}_can9_gnsspos
WHERE
	date_created BETWEEN $__rawTimeFrom('yyyy/MM/dd') AND $__rawTimeTo('yyyy/MM/dd') 
	AND
    $__timeFilter(t)
GROUP BY
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval)	
ORDER BY
    Time ASC

SELECT
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval) as Time,
    AVG(speed) as AVG_speed
FROM
    tbl_${device:csv}_can9_gnssspeed
WHERE
	date_created BETWEEN $__rawTimeFrom('yyyy/MM/dd') AND $__rawTimeTo('yyyy/MM/dd') 
	AND
    $__timeFilter(t)
GROUP BY
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval)
ORDER BY
    Time ASC

spec.name: device
spec.query: Trailer 0004: VIN_FMC_0004, Trailer 0005: VIN_FMC_0005, Trailer 0006: VIN_FMC_0006, Trailer 0007: VIN_FMC_0007, Trailer TEST: VIN_FMC_TEST

spec.rawSQL:
SELECT MessageName
FROM tbl_${device}_messages
WHERE date_created = '2024/01/01'
AND MessageName <> 'messages'
ORDER BY MessageName ASC
SHOW COLUMNS IN `tbl_${device:csv}_${message:csv}`
